item.title: Jamie Dimon says Trump’s $5 billion debanking lawsuit ‘has no merit’ but he’s sympathetic to concerns
item.description: The suit against JPMorgan, the world's biggest bank by market cap, and its CEO puts Dimon in an awkward position.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves after hours: MongoDB, Plug Power, Credo Technology & more
item.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in extended trading.

item.title: Retail investors had two favorite trades during Monday's market turmoil
item.description: Mom-and-pop investors rushed into a pair of trades following the strikes on Iran.

item.title: Berkshire Hathaway shares drop nearly 5% after poor fourth-quarter results, no bold moves by new CEO Abel
item.description: Some had hoped for more aggressive signals on capital deployment given the company's swelling cash balance.

item.title: Citadel’s various hedge funds rise in February, beating the S&P 500 in a choppy month
item.description: The firm's flagship multistrategy Wellington fund rose 1.9% in February, bringing its year-to-date gain to 2.9%.
